steps.title: Find the meaning the blank must carry
steps.content: The example sentence is the key: scholars may “inadvertently overlook nuances” in Alcott’s work. The blank must match “overlook”—to dismiss or undervalue subtle features of an author’s style.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — magnify: Magnify means to enlarge or emphasize—the opposite of overlooking. ✗
  • Choice B — scrutinize: Scrutinize means to examine closely—again the opposite of overlooking. ✗
  • Choice C — discount: Discount means to disregard or undervalue, which matches “overlook” in this context. ✓
  • Choice D — denounce: Denounce means to publicly condemn—too active and hostile compared to inadvertently overlooking. ✗
That matches Choice C — discount.
